data.label: ABS ECU Firmware
data.description: Stores ABS control firmware and safety-critical braking algorithms. Protected by Authenticity, Integrity, Availability.

data.label: ABS Calibration Data
data.description: Stores calibration parameters, variant coding, and NVM configuration. Protected by Integrity, Availability, Non-repudiation.

data.label: Wheel Speed Sensors
data.description: Four hall-effect/magnetoresistive sensors delivering wheel rotation data via PWM. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

data.label: Hydraulic Control Unit
data.description: Actuates brake pressure via solenoid valves and pump motor. Receives commands from ABS MCU. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

data.label: CAN Transceiver
data.description: Physical-layer CAN-FD transceiver bridging the MCU CAN controller to the in-vehicle CAN bus. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

data.label: OBD-II Interface
data.description: Provides diagnostic access (UDS) to the ABS ECU. Properties: Authorization.

data.label: Brake Pressure Data
data.description: Real-time hydraulic pressure values per wheel channel computed by the ABS control algorithm. Properties: Authenticity, Integrity.

data.label: Diagnostic Data
data.description: Diagnostic information logged by the ABS ECU. Properties: Integrity.

data.label: Vehicle CAN Bus
data.description: In-vehicle CAN/CAN-FD network shared with other ECUs. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

data.label: ECM
data.description: External node providing vehicle speed and torque signals to ABS over CAN; receives ABS active flag. Properties: N/A.

Details.name: ABS System
Details.desc: The Anti-lock Braking System (ABS) is a safety-critical system designed to prevent wheel lock-up during braking, improving vehicle control and reducing stopping distances.

Details.name: ABS MCU Group
Details.desc: Group containing the ABS Microcontroller Unit (MCU) and its associated volatile and non-volatile memory.

Details.name: ABS ECU Firmware
Details.desc: Stores ABS control firmware and safety-critical braking algorithms. Protected by Authenticity, Integrity, Availability.

Details.name: ABS Calibration Data
Details.desc: Stores calibration parameters, variant coding, and NVM configuration. Protected by Integrity, Availability, Non-repudiation.

Details.name: Wheel Speed Sensors
Details.desc: Four hall-effect/magnetoresistive sensors delivering wheel rotation data via PWM. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

Details.name: Hydraulic Control Unit
Details.desc: Actuates brake pressure via solenoid valves and pump motor. Receives commands from ABS MCU. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

Details.name: CAN Transceiver
Details.desc: Physical-layer CAN-FD transceiver bridging the MCU CAN controller to the in-vehicle CAN bus. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

Details.name: OBD-II Interface
Details.desc: Provides diagnostic access (UDS) to the ABS ECU. Properties: Authorization.

Details.name: Brake Pressure Data
Details.desc: Real-time hydraulic pressure values per wheel channel computed by the ABS control algorithm. Properties: Authenticity, Integrity.

Details.name: Diagnostic Data
Details.desc: Diagnostic information logged by the ABS ECU. Properties: Integrity.

Details.name: Vehicle CAN Bus
Details.desc: In-vehicle CAN/CAN-FD network shared with other ECUs. Properties: Integrity, Availability.

Details.name: ECM
Details.desc: External node providing vehicle speed and torque signals to ABS over CAN; receives ABS active flag. Properties: N/A.

Details.Description: Tampering of ABS ECU Firmware via an unsecured debug port can lead to corrupted safety-critical wheel-lock prevention logic, resulting in silent failures and a catastrophic safety impact, potentially causing severe injuries or fatalities.
Details.Name: ABS Firmware Tampering via Unsecured Debug Port

Details.name: Elevation of Privilege of OBD-II Interface
